title: FloristryWarehouse Kraft Paper Roll 50cm x 100m Dark Green
features: Premium, strong Kraft paper roll for reliable wrapping and crafting.
Generous roll size: 50 cm wide and approximately 100 m long.
Ideal for floristry, arts and crafts, packaging and retail displays.
Available in a wide range of colours, including metallic options, to suit any theme or project.
description: Premium, strong Kraft paper roll for reliable wrapping and crafting. Generous roll size: 50 cm wide and approximately 100 m long. Supplied in protective cellophane wrap to keep the paper clean and damage-free. Ideal for floristry, arts and crafts, packaging and retail displays. Available in a wide range of colours, including metallic options, to suit any theme or project. Dual-sided design: one side coloured, the reverse in natural brown Kraft. Eco-conscious production with colour printed using water-based inks. Actual colour may vary a little from the photo depending on your monitor settings. All sizes are approximate.
